title: Ubiquiti UMA-D - Dual Band Directional Mesh Antenna
description: UMA-D is a directional or sector dual-band 2x2 MIMO antenna with a 90° beamwidth angle in the 2.4GHz and 45° beamwidth angle in the 5GHz band. Antenna gain in 2.4GHz band is 10dBi and at 5GHz the gain is up to 15dBi. 2 RSMA female connectors are used for connection to the transmitter. Attachment to the mast / wall is possible by attached 3-axis ball joint, screws and metal straps Antenna Holder Metal ring (2) pigtail (RSMA-male - RSMA-male)
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 VSWR < 2,0 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 25 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 45 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 90 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 10, 15 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA female
